  • Überblick
  • Baum
  • Veraltet
  • Index
  • Suchen
  • Hilfe

    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    Article
    Represents a catalog article with inventory and pricing data.
    ArticleDialog
    This class provides static methods to display dialogs for adding and updating articles.
    ArticleExporter
    Utility to export a JTable with article data into a PDF file.
    ArticleGUI
    ArticleGUI with category support for better organization.
    ArticleGUI.CategoryRange
    Helper class to represent a category and its associated article number range.
    ArticleGUI.RoundedPanel
    A custom JPanel with rounded corners and a specified background color.
    ArticleListGUI
    The ArticleListGUI class provides a graphical user interface for displaying and managing a list of articles along with their quantities.
    ArticleManager
    ArticleManager with intelligent caching for improved performance.
    ArticleQrCodeDialog
    Dialog for importing QR code scan data from the server.
    ArticleQrPreviewDialog
    Dialog for previewing QR codes for selected articles and exporting them as a PDF.
    ArticleStatsDialog
    Renders the article statistics dialog based on the current table model.
    ArticleUtils
    The ArticleUtils class provides utility methods for handling articles, including loading and managing article categories from a JSON file, calculating prices for filling based on article details, and determining the category of an article based on its number.
    ArticleUtils.VolumeUnit
    Enum representing volume units for price calculation, such as liters and milliliters.
    ClientDialog
    The ClientDialog class provides static methods to display dialogs for adding and updating client information.
    ClientGUI
    The ClientGUI class provides a graphical user interface for managing clients in the inventory system.
    ClientManager
    The ClientManager class is responsible for managing client data in the database.
    CompleteOrderGUI
    GUI for completing orders.
    ConverterGUI
    A GUI for calculating the price of filling an article with a certain amount.
    DatabaseManager
    Simple DatabaseManager for SQLite.
    DatabaseManager.ResultMapper<T>
    Functional interface for mapping a ResultSet row to an object of type T.
    DepartmentManager
    This class manages the departments in the database.
    DisplayWarningDialog
    This class provides methods to display warnings in a modern, styled dialog.
    EditOrderGUI
    Modern edit order GUI with improved visual design and user experience.
    ImportUtils
    TODO: Performance optimizations if needed for large files.
    JFrameUtils
    Utility class for creating and styling Swing components with a consistent look and feel across the application.
    JFrameUtils.GradientPanel
    A custom JPanel that paints itself with a horizontal gradient background and rounded corners.
    JFrameUtils.RoundedPanel
    A custom JPanel that paints itself with rounded corners and a specified background color.
    LogManager
    LogManager for managing application logs in the database.
    LogManager.Log
    Log record representing a log entry in the database.
    LogManager.LogLevel
    Log levels enum for better type safety
    LogsGUI
    The LogsGUI class provides a graphical user interface for viewing, filtering, and managing logs related to orders, suppliers, and supplier orders in the inventory system.
    LogUtils
    The LogUtils class provides utility methods for logging messages to a log file and using Log4j for logging.
    Main
    Main entry point for VEBO Lagersystem application.
    MainGUI
    Modern Main Dashboard for VEBO Lagersystem with Tabbed Interface
    NetUtils
    The NetUtils class provides utility methods for network-related operations, such as checking for active network interfaces, retrieving the client's IP address from an HttpExchange object, obtaining the local IP address of the host, and fetching the public IP address using an external service.
    NewOrderGUI
    Modern new order GUI with improved visual design and user experience.
    Note
    Simple domain model for a personal note.
    NotesGUI
    Notes manager window for viewing, creating, and updating personal notes.
    NotesManager
    The NotesManager class is responsible for managing notes in the LagerSystem application.
    Order
    Represents an order with sender/receiver details and ordered article quantities.
    OrderActions
    The OrderActions class contains inner classes that implement the ActionListener interface to handle actions related to orders in the LagerSystem application.
    OrderActions.CompleteOrderAction
    The CompleteOrderAction class implements the ActionListener interface and defines the action to be performed when the "Complete Order" button is clicked.
    OrderActions.CreateOrderAction
    The CreateOrderAction class implements the ActionListener interface and defines the action to be performed when the "Create Order" button is clicked.
    OrderExport
    The OrderExport class provides a utility method for creating a PDF export of an order.
    OrderGUI
    The OrderGUI class provides a graphical user interface for managing orders in the inventory system.
    OrderLoggingUtils
    The OrderLoggingUtils class provides utility methods for logging order processing activities to a log file.
    OrderManager
     
    PartialOrderGUI
     
    QRCodeGenerator
    Utility class for generating QR code images using ZXing.
    QRCodeUtils
    Utility class for QR code operations: generation, retrieval, and parsing.
    RoundButton
    Rounded button that respects its actual size and follows the ThemeManager.
    ScanServer
     
    SchedulerManager
    Verwaltet geplante Aufgaben wie die Überprüfung des Lagerbestands.
    SettingsGUI
    Moderne Einstellungen-GUI für das VEBO Lagersystem.
    SettingsGUI.Variable
    Schlüssel/Mapping der unterstützten Einstellungsvariablen.
    SettingsUtils
    Utility helper class for building and managing UI-related settings components.
    SettingsUtils.RoundedPanel
    Custom panel implementation that renders a rounded card surface.
    SplashscreenGUI
    Displays a modern splash screen for the LagerSystem application.
    SupplierOrderGUI
    GUI window that manages supplier reorders for articles.
    ThemeManager
    Centralized theme manager for the Swing application.
    ThemeManager.Dark
    Dark Theme
    ThemeManager.JOptionPaneTheme
    Applies theme-aware UI defaults specifically for JOptionPane dialogs.
    ThemeManager.Light
     
    ThemeManager.Theme
    Available application themes.
    UnicodeSymbols
    Cross-platform symbols for consistent display on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
    UpdateManager
    Manages application updates by checking GitHub releases.
    UpdateManager.ChannelUpdateResult
    Result of checking all release channels
    UpdateManager.ReleaseChannel
    Enum representing different release channels/branches
    UpdateManager.ReleaseInfo
    Container class for release information.
    UpdateManager.VersionComparisonResult
    Result of version comparison
    User
    Represents a user with a name and a list of order IDs.
    UserDataDir
    Responsible for determining the directory to write application data, across multiple platforms.
    UserManager
     
    Vendor
    Represents a vendor with contact details and supplied articles.
    VendorDialog
     
    VendorGUI
    VendorGUI with GUI-level caching. - Caches vendor list for faster reloads (TTL-based) - Invalidates cache on add/edit/delete/refresh
    VendorManager
     
    VendorOrderLogging
     
    Warning
    Represents a warning with severity type, message, and resolution flags.
    Warning.WarningType
    The type of warning.
    WarningManager
